scripts.build:wasm: mkdir -p ../humanizer-wasm/dist && tinygo build -o ../humanizer-wasm/dist/humanizer.wasm -target wasm -no-debug ./src/main.go && cp src/wasm_exec.js ../humanizer-wasm/dist/wasm_exec.js
scripts.build:core: pnpm run clean && tsc -p ./tsconfig.json && cp src/wasm_exec.js dist/wasm_exec.js
